name: supermemory-local-kit
description: Ollama + Supermemory 셀프호스팅 + Claude Code 플러그인 + 관리 UI 원스톱 키트

scripts.server:restart: launchctl kickstart -k gui/$(id -u)/com.supermemory.local 2>/dev/null || launchctl kickstart -k gui/$(id -u)/com.adanbae.supermemory.local
scripts.server:stop: launchctl bootout gui/$(id -u)/com.supermemory.local 2>/dev/null; launchctl bootout gui/$(id -u)/com.adanbae.supermemory.local 2>/dev/null; true
